calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marita Beckum and Janice Lawrence for John Dension.

Ms. Lawrence stated that they felt the executor should be paid the full statutory amount; that he had done a good job preserving the value of the estate. Ms. Beckum stated that due to the size and complexity of this estate the request for extraordinary fees was not out of line. The Court questioned if there wasn't opposition why the fees were so high. Ms. Beckum stated that there were several residences, assets in New Zealand, and the decedent had been involved in litigation. Ms. Lawrence stated that they had asked for fees appropriately; this had been time consuming. The matter was taken under submission, and the Court noted for the record that there might be reductions in fees.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Janice Lawrence appeared for John Denson. Marie Beckons.
The court requests a declaration filed by Janice Lawrence regarding why the court should allow extraordinary fees to be paid now rather than at the end. The matter is taken under submission until filing of the declaration.
Judicial Officer: Dorothy McMath. Reporter:Tina Paxton Clerk:Rosie Noguera
